title: Shadows of Brimstone - FoFo Character Overview
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nxJqaJgDQIE

Daniel (@dungeondive) runs through the full roster of Forbidden Fortress characters ahead of a new group campaign, weighing up which hero to play.

The lineup gets a thorough examination: the Enforcer, a slow, brutal bouncer who beats money out of people and loses fingers when missions fail; the Kitsune, a fox-spirit trickster with elemental magic and a pouncing combat style; the Soldier, a stationary sharpshooter with an upgradeable rifle; the Geisha, a cunning support character with a hidden dagger and parasol; the Traveling Monk with his chi-powered fists of fury; the Assassin and her smoke-bomb teleportation; the Samurai Warrior (too similar to the Western wandering samurai for Daniel's taste); the Trederra Veteran, a cross-setting soldier with a darkstone carbine that corrupts you each time you fire it; the Sumo with a staggering 20 health and the thousand-hand slap; and the Sorceress with her elemental magic system.

Daniel's shortlist: Enforcer, Traveling Monk, Trederra Veteran, or Sumo. The video doubles as a character creation guide, showing how starting ability choices, personal items, and faction affiliations create meaningfully different builds from the same class. Flying Frog's attention to thematic character design shines throughout.

----

Which of these characters would you pick for your party—and which would you avoid?
